list.name: Failure Discovered
list.query: SELECT name_of,type_of FROM (SELECT name_of,type_of,active FROM "failures" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "sys_name", "failure_type", "object_type" LIMIT 25) WHERE ("active" = 'True')

list.name: Failure Resolved
list.query: SELECT name_of,type_of FROM (SELECT name_of,type_of,active FROM "failures" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "sys_name", "failure_type", "object_type" LIMIT 25) WHERE ("active" = 'False')

targets.query: SELECT mean("combinedResponseTime") FROM "volumes" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/ AND "vol_name" =~ /^$Volume$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "sys_name", "vol_name" fill(none)

SELECT mean("ds_combinedResponseTime") FROM "downsample_retention"."volumes" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/ AND "vol_name" =~ /^$Volume$/) AND $timeFilter AND time < now() - 1w GROUP BY time($__interval), "sys_name", "vol_name" fill(none)
SELECT mean("combinedThroughput") FROM "disks" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/ AND "sys_tray" =~ /^$Tray$/ AND "sys_tray_slot" =~ /^$Slot$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)

SELECT mean("ds_combinedThroughput") FROM "downsample_retention"."volumes" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/ AND "vol_name" =~ /^$Volume$/) AND $timeFilter AND time < now() - 1w GROUP BY time($__interval), "sys_name", "vol_name" fill(none)
SELECT mean("combinedIOps") FROM "disks" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/ AND "sys_tray" =~ /^$Tray$/ AND "sys_tray_slot" =~ /^$Slot$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)

SELECT mean("readResponseTime") FROM "disks" WHERE ("sys_name" =~ /^$System$/ AND "sys_tray" =~ /^$Tray$/ AND "sys_tray_slot" =~ /^$Slot$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(none)

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "volumes" WITH KEY = "sys_name"

list.definition: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM volumes WITH KEY = "vol_name" WHERE "sys_name" =~ /$System/
